steps.title: Identify the parallel action and its tense
steps.content: Zufall “advised” McVicker (simple past). The phrase “In addition” signals that the blank describes another action by Zufall in the same historical period — these parallel actions require consistent verb tense.

steps.title: Apply consistent verb tense to the blank
steps.content:
Parallel actions in the same historical timeframe must use the same verb tense. Suggested (simple past) matches advised and maintains this consistency. The other three choices violate this — they shift to present, incorrectly signal past perfect timing, or create awkward constructions.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
